data.description: plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md contains 4 lines that call plugin scripts directly via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/... instead of using the .claude/scripts/dso shim. This causes the shim-refs pre-commit check to fail (4 violations reported). Affected lines: 68 (ticket-lib.sh source), 136 (preconditions-coverage-harness.sh), 153 (fp-rate-tracker.sh), 167 (sc13-restart-analysis.sh). Fix: replace each direct ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/<name>.sh call with the dso shim equivalent, or add # shim-exempt: <reason> annotations where the shim cannot be used (e.g. agent-context sourcing).
data.title: [completion-verifier]: direct CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT script calls -> shim-refs violation (4 lines)
